notes: Audio envelope shows strong events at 1.3 s, 15.6 s, and 47.4 s. Interpreting 15.6 s as the spoken start marker, the programmed 30 s run ends at 45.6 s. USB meter mWh resolution is 1 mWh, so energy uncertainty is roughly one count (3.6 J). Values are gross BBB+transmitter input energy, not active-minus-idle energy.
